underlying_goal: Redesign launchpad pages to match overall site design style, fixing ugly UI elements and maintaining consistent colors
friction_detail: Claude introduced unwanted colors (purple gradients, heavy opacity) that deviated from original design, requiring multiple rounds of user complaints and fixes.
brief_summary: User wanted launchpad pages restyled to match existing design; Claude made progress but introduced unwanted color changes that the user had to repeatedly flag for correction.
